title.purpose: Dialogs, panels, and important grouped content.

body.purpose: Conversation, explanations, and primary readable content.

label.purpose: Controls, tabs, compact headers, and status labels.

shadows.name: transient-low
shadows.purpose: Menus, compact popovers, and directly manipulated objects.

shadows.name: transient-high
shadows.purpose: Dialogs, lightboxes, and full authoring overlays.

motion.name: state-fast
motion.purpose: Hover, pressed, selection, and compact disclosure feedback.

motion.name: spatial-standard
motion.purpose: Panels, sheets, and state changes with a spatial relationship.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single strongest action within a local decision area.

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: A bounded neutral action that remains subordinate to the primary action.

components.name: Text Field
components.description: A compact field with a strong, accessible focus boundary.

components.name: Active Navigation Row
components.description: A compact current-location row with text, icon space, and a scarce action tint.

components.name: Live Status Chip
components.description: A labeled state signal; never a color-only status dot.

components.name: Session Work Surface
components.description: A grounded workstream container connecting actor, state, action, and output.
components.html:
Implement responsive navigationIn progress

Codex is updating the mobile navigation structure.

narrative.overview: Atrium is a focused shared workspace in which conversation and active work remain visibly connected. Its base is restrained and operational, but not inert: presence, progress, intervention, and completion introduce purposeful signs of life.
keyCharacteristics: Restrained, state-rich color with one scarce action accent.
Dense but scannable product typography using the platform's familiar sans-serif.
Tonal panels and dividers for persistent structure; controlled lift for transient layers.
Precise, responsive controls with complete interaction states.
Shared conceptual hierarchy with platform-native behavior.

rules.name: The One Live Signal Rule
rules.body: Indigo identifies action, selection, focus, or genuinely active work. Do not spend it on decoration.

rules.name: The Grounded Workspace Rule
rules.body: Persistent panes and ordinary content are separated by tone, spacing, or a one-pixel edge. Shadows appear only when an element truly occupies a higher interaction layer.

dos: Do make actor, status, current action, and available intervention legible in every active-work surface.
Do preserve familiar product and platform affordances.
donts: Don't make Atrium feel like a generic AI dashboard.
Don't reduce agents to bots bolted onto ordinary chat.
Don't use color as the only indicator of important state.
